name: Spiced Cocoa Doughnuts
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, stir together the flour, cocoa, baking powder, baking soda, cinnamon, mace, and salt.
2. In a large bowl, beat the sugar and butter until creamy. Add the egg; beat well.
3. Add the flour mixture alternately with milk, mixing until well blended. Form into a ball of dough.
4. On a lightly floured surface, roll the dough to a thickness of 1/4 inch. Use a floured 2 1/2-inch doughnut cutter to cut into rings.
5. Re-roll the dough as necessary. Fry two or three doughnuts at a time in hot fat (375°F) for about 30 seconds, turning once with a slotted spoon.
6. Drain on paper towels.
7. Stir together the powdered sugar and dash of cinnamon. Sprinkle over the tops of warm doughnuts.
